lotmcraft.angel_authority_ability.descri: Puissance angélique qui vous permet de traverser le monde des esprits et de briser des artefacts
lotmcraft.evil_detection_ability.descrip: Met en évidence toutes les entités maléfiques et mortes-vivantes autour de vous
lotmcraft.sun_spells_ability.description: Lance divers sorts simples du domaine du soleil, principalement efficaces contre les morts-vivants
lotmcraft.holy_song_ability.description: Joue un air sacré pour vous buffer
lotmcraft.fire_of_light_ability.descript: Use Sacré Feu to smite your foes
lotmcraft.holy_light_summoning_ability.d: Summon a Sacré Lumière from the sky
lotmcraft.sun_halo_ability.description: Crée un halo doré autour de votre tête, vous buffe ainsi que vos alliés
lotmcraft.notary_buff_ability.descriptio: Amplifiez vos attaques en faisant appel à votre dieu
lotmcraft.notary_debuff_ability: Dieu dit que ce n'est pas efficace
lotmcraft.notary_debuff_ability.descript: Affaiblissez vos ennemis en faisant appel à votre dieu
lotmcraft.light_of_holiness_ability.desc: Invoque un pilier de lumière brûlant du ciel
lotmcraft.purification_halo_ability.desc: Produit un halo qui purifie tout
lotmcraft.unshadowed_spear_ability.descr: Condense a Spear made of pure Soleillight
lotmcraft.unshadowed_domain_ability.desc: Illumine chaque recoin d'une région et purifie toutes les entités à portée
lotmcraft.holy_eye_ability.description: Infuse vos yeux de lumière pure et libère un faisceau de lumière aveuglant partout où vous regardez
lotmcraft.flaring_sun_ability.descriptio: Summon a huge ball of pure Lumière condensed by sacred flame
lotmcraft.wall_of_light_ability.descript: Summon a Wall made of Lumière, that will not let enemies through it
lotmcraft.sword_of_justice_ability.descr: A Sword made of Lumière will strike enemies from above
lotmcraft.spear_of_light_ability.descrip: A Spear made of Pure White Lumière will be summoned, enemies hit by it won't be able to flee
lotmcraft.solar_envoy_ability.descriptio: Transform Yourself into a miniature Soleil, setting ablaze everything in range
lotmcraft.wings_of_light_ability.descrip: Invoque une paire d'ailes qui vous permettent de voler
lotmcraft.pure_white_light_ability.descr: Under the pure White Lumière, everything will be disintegrated
lotmcraft.divine_kingdom_manifestation_a: Manifest an embryonic Royaume Divin to immediately scorch all non beyonders and weaken other Beyonders to the point of helplessness
lotmcraft.pyrokinesis_ability.descriptio: Contrôlez les flammes, lancez des boules de feu, créez des murs de feu, invoquez des corbeaux de feu, condensez des lances de feu et laissez le feu engloutir tout dans la zone
lotmcraft.cull_ability.description: Découvrez vos ennemis et leurs faiblesses pour augmenter vos dégâts contre eux
lotmcraft.flame_mastery_ability.descript: Version plus puissante de la Pyrokynésie. Vous pouvez désormais lancer plusieurs boules de feu, déclencher une explosion massive de feu ou vous transformer en flamme, planant dans les cieux
lotmcraft.steel_mastery_ability.descript: Transformez votre corps en acier pour annuler les dégâts, ou transformez votre flamme en acier pour lier vos ennemis avec elle
lotmcraft.chain_of_command_ability.descr: Faites des entités vos subordonnés. Ils combattront pour vous et vous pourrez répartir vos dégâts entre eux.
ability.lotmcraft.chain_of_command.no_co: L'entité n'a pas voulu devenir votre subordonné
lotmcraft.fog_of_war_ability.description: Créez un brouillard dense pour gêner vos ennemis et vous avantager
lotmcraft.war_cry_ability.description: Un cri assourdissant qui blesse vos ennemis et booste vos capacités
lotmcraft.war_song_ability.description: Buffez votre force et votre vitesse avec une chanson
lotmcraft.essence_of_war_ability.descrip: Invoque une bannière qui debuff lourdement les ennemis et vous buffe dans une certaine zone
lotmcraft.flight_ability.description: Volez comme un papillon, piquez comme une guêpe
lotmcraft.weather_manipulation_ability.d: Changez la météo, causant des tempêtes de neige, des sécheresses et des tornades
lotmcraft.conquering_ability.description: Conquer all entities around you. If their Sequence is lower they will be rendered completely helpless and if not they will still struggle to resist
lotmcraft.flame_authority_ability.descri: Manipulate purple flame, throwing spears of destruction, summoning an inferno, that turns everything inside to a dust and flame vortex, burning every living creature around you to a crisp
lotmcraft.sacrifice_ability.description: Sacrifice to the Essence of Guerre for Power.
lotmcraft.puppet_soldier_creation_abilit: Create 5 Marionnette Soldiers, each equal to Sequence 4 Red Priest Demigod and command them
lotmcraft.illusory_scales_ability.descri: Create illusory scales around you to protect you to increase your resistance
lotmcraft.wrath_ability.description: Get enraged and boost your strength and speed in exchange for some of your sanity
lotmcraft.raging_blows_ability.descripti: A series of powerful blows that damage your opp
lotmcraft.water_manipulation_ability.des: The ability to manipulate water to damage your opponent
lotmcraft.wind_manipulation_ability.desc: The ability to manipulate wind to damage your opponent
lotmcraft.blessings_of_wind_ability.desc: Boost yourself with the blessings of wind
lotmcraft.lightning_ability.description: Summon lightnings to strike your opponent
lotmcraft.siren_song_ability.description: A song that affect your opponent in various ways
lotmcraft.strong_lightning_ability.descr: Summon a powerful lightning to strike your opponent
lotmcraft.tsunami_ability.description: Summon a tsunami to wash your opponent
lotmcraft.earthquake_ability.description: Cause a tremblor through the earth damage your opponent
lotmcraft.hurricane_ability.description: Summon a hurricane to rip through your opponent
lotmcraft.roar_ability.description: A deafening cry that damages your enemies
lotmcraft.wrath_of_the_ocean_ability.des: Summon the wrath of the ocean to make all water boiling hot or repel all non aquatic creatures from the ocean
lotmcraft.lightning_branch_ability.descr: Shoot out a lightning that spread out to form a
lotmcraft.torrential_downpour_ability.de: Bring fouth a strong rainfall that deals damage the opponent
lotmcraft.lightning_storm_ability.descri: Summon a lightning storm that rains down a group of lightning, destroying your opponent
lotmcraft.calamity_creation_ability.desc: Summon a calamity creation to befall the area you stand
Transform your body into pure energy
lotmcraft.heavenly_punishment_ability.de: Call in a divine lightning to strike down your opponent
lotmcraft.roar_of_the_thunder_god_abilit: The cry of a god that destroy your enemies
lotmcraft.poisonous_flame_ability.descri: Flamme that poisons and burns your enemy
lotmcraft.flame_spells_ability.descripti: Manipulate with flame to either shoot fireballs or make it explode around you
lotmcraft.language_of_foulness_ability.d: Language of devils, it has several uses, like slowing your target, corrupting them or deal massive damage with Mort
lotmcraft.avatar_of_desire_ability.descr: Transform into illusionary, thick, black liquid that is a collection of emothions and desires. Anyone you touch will get corrupted, but if you stumble upon someone who is stronger than you, you will lose control
lotmcraft.defiling_seed_ability.descript: Bury your seed into target to corrupt them
lotmcraft.demonic_spells_ability.descrip: Cast devastating demonic magic: plant a Acid Swamp dealing posion, create a clone of yourself that explodes, plant a wall of fire around you no one can get in or get out
lotmcraft.mind_fog_ability.description: Drain sanity from nearby enemies and inflict random negative effects
lotmcraft.desire_control_ability.descrip: Manipulate the desires of your enemies, forcing them to lose control
lotmcraft.corrupting_voice_ability.descr: While active, typing in chat emits a corrupting sound wave that deals damage and applies random negative effects to all entities within 50 blocks. Damage scales with the length of your message.
lotmcraft.malice_seed_ability.descriptio: Bury a seed of malice in a target. The seed grows over time. If you die while the seed is active, you respawn at the target's location and deal damage based on growth.
lotmcraft.fear_aura_ability.description: Unleash an aura of terror around you, blinding, slowing, and sapping the sanity of all nearby enemies
lotmcraft.flames_of_the_abyss_ability.de: Channel the abyss into devastating green flame. Rain down corrupting meteors, or erupt pillars of toxic abyssal fire from the earth.
lotmcraft.fooling_ability.description: Your opponents suffer from blind stupidity.
lotmcraft.damage_transfer_ability.descri: Transfer vital wounds to other parts of the body, reducing the damage taken. You can heal half of your lost health.
ability.lotmcraft.paper_equipment.no_pap: You don't have any paper in your inventory
lotmcraft.air_bullet_ability.description: Produce air projectile with power and speed comparable to bullets from revolver
lotmcraft.paper_figurine_substitute_abil: Create Substitutes out of paper to take your place when damaged
lotmcraft.flaming_jump_ability.descripti: Teleport into any fire, gaining fire resistance after doing so
lotmcraft.underwater_breathing_ability.d: Create a thin, invisible air pipe which allows you to breath underwater
lotmcraft.puppeteering_ability.descripti: Manipulate Esprit Body Threads to turn anyone into your marionette and command them
ability.lotmcraft.puppeteering.entity_tu: Turned the entity into your marionette
Failed to turn the entity into your marionette
lotmcraft.marionette_controlling_ability: Gain more options for controlling you marionettes. Press shift to cycle through all your marionettes
lotmcraft.historical_void_summoning_abil: Mark items or creatures to be able to summon them from Historic Void, they will disappear after some time, returning to Historic Void

lotmcraft.historical_void_hiding_ability: Hide in Historical Void being invisible, but unable to move, upon leaving it, you will be in exact same spot where you activated it
lotmcraft.grafting_ability.description: Graft together different things, such as locations, health an more. To remove certain Graftings, use ability in proximity while holding shift. For some sub-abilities, to select yourself as the target, just don't select a target.
ability.lotmcraft.grafting.same_entity: You cannot choose the same entity as both source and target
ability.lotmcraft.grafting.resisted: The target's Sequence is too high to be Grafted
lotmcraft.midnight_poem_ability.descript: Recite a poem related to night to either put them to sleep or attack
lotmcraft.nightmare_ability.description: Put your target to sleep and enter their dream, in this state you can reshape blocks, making your enemies suffocate in them, restrain your target, attack them or teleport in short distances. After ending nightmare any damage to blocks will be reverted
lotmcraft.requiem_ability.description: Put your targets Esprit Body in sleep
lotmcraft.spirit_commanding_ability.desc: Command Esprits, making them obey to you
lotmcraft.night_domain_ability.descripti: Unleash Ténèbres to an Area, damaging them and giving them various debuffs, like blindness, slowness, misfortune and darkness. You will also receive buffs
lotmcraft.hair_entanglement_ability.desc: Bind your enemies with your hair
lotmcraft.horror_aura_ability.descriptio: Bring Fear into your enemies, unleashing your Horror Aura. They will be heavily debuffed and lose their sanity
lotmcraft.surge_of_darkness_ability.desc: Flood the area with Ténèbres, bringing Horror and Mort to everything around you
lotmcraft.concealment_ability.descriptio: Conceal everything around you, effectively erasing it
lotmcraft.concealed_domain_ability.descr: Create a concealed domain, sealing those inside
lotmcraft.sword_of_darkness_ability.desc: Create a giant slash that cuts everything in its way
lotmcraft.mighty_blow_ability.descriptio: Strike your target with one single powerful blow
lotmcraft.instigation_ability.descriptio: Instigate two mobs to attack each other
lotmcraft.instigation_ability.not_valid_: You have to select a target mob first
lotmcraft.instigation_ability.cannot_tar: You cannot instigate a mob to attack itself
lotmcraft.shadow_concealment_ability.des: Use shadows to conceal yourself from other people's eyes
lotmcraft.black_flame_ability.descriptio: Conjure Black Flammes to burn your target, it is powerful and hard to extinguish
lotmcraft.frost_ability.description: Manipulate Ice to attack your targets, you can shoot with ice, condense it into spear or freeze whole area around you
lotmcraft.mirror_substitution_ability.de: Create Mirrors, taking damage will break one, teleporting you away and negating the damage
lotmcraft.thread_manipulation_ability.de: Manipulate thin and white threads to attack your enemies, you can shoot them, restrain your target or wrap yourself with it, gaining resistance against any damage
lotmcraft.charm_ability.description: Charm your enemy, it will slow them down and if it hits you, no damage will be dealt. You can't charm enemy twice
lotmcraft.disease_ability.description: Release deadly Disease that spreads in air, it will infect anything near you
lotmcraft.mirror_world_traversal_ability: Enter any glass to traverse between them. To exit it, you have to fly to any glass
lotmcraft.curse_ability.description: Curse your target to Mort, to use it you have to hold target's blood in your offhand
ability.lotmcraft.curse.no_target: The owner of the blood could not be found
ability.lotmcraft.curse.no_blood: You need to have blood in your offhand
lotmcraft.petrification_ability.descript: Petrify enemies and surrounding into stone, stunning them for a long time
lotmcraft.disaster_manifestation_ability: Trigger natural disasters on your enemies, summoning tornados, causing blizzard and drought, causing meteors to fall from sky
lotmcraft.structural_collapse_ability.de: Collapse any building, cave, mountain, ocean and any structure, burying everything
lotmcraft.apocalypse_ability.description: Bring an End in area, dooming everything around you and transforming blocks into obsidian
lotmcraft.cleanse_ability.description: Cleanse yourself or others from negative effects
lotmcraft.plant_controlling_ability.desc: Command Plants to attack your enemies or bind them
lotmcraft.poison_creation_ability.descri: Create deadly poison and spread it in one area or pierce your enemies with it threads
lotmcraft.crossbreeding_ability.descript: Create hybrid between two animals, choose first animal for its form and second for its attributes
ability.lotmcraft.crossbreeding.not_vali: The target is not a valid mob for crossbreeding
ability.lotmcraft.crossbreeding.not_same: You can't cross a mob with itself
lotmcraft.nature_spells_ability.descript: Command Nature to aid you. Create large swamp area that traps your enemies, create a thick layer of wood on your skin to protect or unleash Nature's wrath onto your enemy
ability.lotmcraft.nature_spells.natures_: The target has already drawn the Wrath of Nature
lotmcraft.life_aura_ability.description: Emanate an Aura of Life nourishing plant growth and healing nearby entities
lotmcraft.mutation_creation_ability.desc: Randomly mutate your target, damaging them and draining their sanity
lotmcraft.life_deprivation_ability.descr: Drain life from your targets or your surroundings
lotmcraft.maternal_embrace_ability.descr: Seal your target in a coffin
ability.lotmcraft.maternal_embrace.too_s: You cannot seal a target with the same or higher Sequence
lotmcraft.area_desolation_ability.descri: Designate an area (200x200) that will become desolate and lifeless. Use the ability again in the same area to revert it back to normal
lotmcraft.blooming_area_ability.descript: Designate an area (200x200) that will become lush and flourish greatly. Inside there wil be no hunger and other various effects. Use the ability again in the same area to revert it back to normal
lotmcraft.world_creation_ability.descrip: Create and nurture a pocket world
lotmcraft.wrath_of_nature_ability.descri: Command nature to attack your foes in various ways
lotmcraft.door_opening_ability.descripti: Use on solid walls to pass through them
lotmcraft.spells_ability.description: Various spells of Trickmaster. Shock your enemies, make a breeeze, stun them with light or freeze them
lotmcraft.recording_ability.description: Record an ability of beyonder for one time usage
ability.lotmcraft.recording.too_high_seq: The ability was too high of a sequence
lotmcraft.invisible_hand_ability.descrip: Use your invisible Hand to push and pull entities
lotmcraft.travelers_door_ability.descrip: Travel through Esprit World to reach your destination, or enter it by yourself
lotmcraft.blink_afterimage_ability.descr: Une fois activé, une post-image sera laissée derrière chaque fois que vous clignez des yeux, et attaquera votre adversaire avec des capacités enregistrées. Consommera un Ver des Étoiles.
lotmcraft.door_transfiguration_ability.d: Se transformer en portes illusoires pour éviter les dégâts entrants
lotmcraft.secret_keeping_ability.descrip: S’octroyer à soi-même et à ses alliés proches un certain niveau de dissimulation contre la divination.
lotmcraft.space_concealment_ability.desc: Separate a fixed space. Sneak while using to remove all concealed spaces. Use Collapse spaces to destroy anything inside and hurt entities.
lotmcraft.exile_ability.description: Banish your enemy to End, they will come back shortly after
lotmcraft.door_substitution_ability.desc: Create a Door Substitute, next damage will be transferred to door, saving you from it
lotmcraft.wandering_ability.no_dimension: Found no Dimension to travel to
lotmcraft.symbolization_ability.descript: Transform into collection of symbols, gaining ability to fly and massively increase your move speed
lotmcraft.sealing_ability.description: Seal your enemies. In this state they won't be able to move and use their abilities
lotmcraft.space_tearing_ability.descript: Tear the space and make it become swallowed by the void
lotmcraft.waypoint_ability.description: Set Waypoints that you can then teleport to. Cycle through the waypoints by sneaking.
lotmcraft.teleportation_authority_abilit: Le contrôle initial sur l’Autorité de Téléportation vous permet de vous téléporter instantanément, vous et les autres
lotmcraft.black_hole_ability.description: Bend and Shatter space, time and light to create a Black Hole
lotmcraft.replicating_ability.descriptio: Replicate Beyonder abilities for multiple usage
ability.lotmcraft.replicating.too_high_s: The ability was too high of a sequence
lotmcraft.distortion_field_ability.descr: Create an area where enemies get randomly teleported around and find it hard to use their abilities
lotmcraft.area_miniaturization_ability.d: Bring an Area with you, miniaturizing it and saving it inside your inventory
lotmcraft.space_distortion_ability.descr: Create a localized anomaly that pulls in everything.
lotmcraft.pocket_dimension_ability.descr: Create a Pocket Dimension in other Dimension, no one can enter it, without your help
lotmcraft.excavated_area.description: Area that was miniaturized with Area Miniaturization
lotmcraft.space_time_storm_ability.descr: Unleash power, that is enough to shatter Space and Time, turning everything in range into Void, that is deadly to everyone without Void Immunity
lotmcraft.space_fragmentation_ability.de: Summon illusory planets to create massive gravitational pull, distorting time and shattering the space before you
lotmcraft.conceptualization_ability.desc: Turn into conceptual symbols gaining massive resistance to most damage and being able to fly at high speeds
lotmcraft.door_authority_ability.descrip: You gain full authority over the concept of Doors, being able to make all Doors and seals malfunction or strengthening them
lotmcraft.sealing_authority_ability.desc: You gain full authority over Scellement, being able to Lock Dimensions or create incredibly strong seals
ability.lotmcraft.sealing_authority.make: You need to hold an item in your offhand
lotmcraft.spectating_ability.description: Spectate the minds and thoughts of the people around you
lotmcraft.telepathy_ability.description: Read the minds of the people around you
lotmcraft.psychological_cue_ability.desc: Sneak while using the ability for a detailed description
lotmcraft.frenzy_ability.description: Thrown your enemies mind into distress
lotmcraft.placate_ability.description: Placate someone to stop them from loosing control
lotmcraft.psychological_invisibility_abi: Make yourself invisibility to a person's mind
lotmcraft.battle_hypnosis_ability.descri: Control your enemies to do abnormal actions for a short period of time
lotmcraft.dragon_scales_ability.descript: Create dragon scales that cover your skin to protect you
lotmcraft.sleep_inducement_ability.descr: Cause your enemies to fall asleep
lotmcraft.nightmare_spectator_ability.de: Cause your enemies to dream a nightmare, dealing damage
lotmcraft.virtual_persona_ability.descri: Create a virtual persona to serve as shield and sword of the mind
ability.lotmcraft.virtual_persona.avatar: Weaved an avatar from a Virtual Persona
lotmcraft.manipulation_ability.descripti: Control the movement of your target
lotmcraft.mental_plague.description: Spread a mental plague that will drive all entities to insanity
lotmcraft.dream_weave_ability.descriptio: Create near real hallucinations to attack the enemy
lotmcraft.discernment_ability.descriptio: Discern everyone around you. Combines effects of Telepathy and Spectating
lotmcraft.pure_idealism_ability.descript: Immerse yourself into role of others
lotmcraft.dream_maze_ability.description: Bring all those sleeping into a maze within dreams
lotmcraft.disaster_fantasia_ability.desc: Envision fantasies of disaster into reality
lotmcraft.story_writing_ability.descript: Put your target into a story of your creation. Sneak while using the ability for a detailed description of the ability
lotmcraft.mind_world_authority_ability.d: Control Mind World at your will
lotmcraft.psyche_storm_ability.descripti: Create an area of effect that cause your enemies to loose control
lotmcraft.calamity_attraction_ability.de: Call upon a calamity to befall your enemies
lotmcraft.luck_release_ability.descripti: Release all of your accumulated luck
lotmcraft.misfortune_gifting_ability.des: Give to your enemies, a misfortune onto them
lotmcraft.blessing_ability.description: Give a blessing gifted to your allies
ability.lotmcraft.curse_of_misfortune.re: The target's Sequence is too high to be Cursed
lotmcraft.spiritual_baptism_ability.desc: Make the targets spirit clean and stable, effectively removing all mental effects
lotmcraft.words_of_misfortune_ability.de: Leave behind words of Misfortune that will bring anyone who steps near them great misfortune
lotmcraft.prophecy_ability.description: Speak a Prophecy. Once spoken it has a high chance to turn true. For detailed explaination, use ability while sneaking.
lotmcraft.cycle_of_fate_ability.descript: Create a cycle of fate in an area. Once triggered everything will return to how it was when the cycle was created
ability.lotmcraft.cycle_of_fate.no_cycle: No active Cycle of Fate found
lotmcraft.theft_ability.description: If used on Player, it will attempt to steal any item from his inventory. If used on Mob, it will give random drop related to them, like meat from animals or arrows from skeleton
lotmcraft.decryption_ability.description: Gain insight into you enemies and what items they posses
lotmcraft.gift_ability.description: Gift the item in your offhand to your target. Some items may have different effects, like tnt or anvils
lotmcraft.ability.lotmcraft.gift.no_item: You need to hold an item in your offhand to gift it
lotmcraft.ability_theft_ability.descript: Steal an ability from your opponent making them unable to use it for a short time. This ability will grow stronger with your Sequence
ability.lotmcraft.ability_theft.not_beyo: The target is not a Beyonder
lotmcraft.mundane_conceptual_theft_abili: Steal mundane abilities from your target, like their sight, ability to walk, distance between you and the target or their health
lotmcraft.parasitation_ability.descripti: Possess your target, you are invulnerable until it dies
ability.lotmcraft.parasitation.target_to: Target is too strong to parasitize
lotmcraft.host_controlling_ability.descr: Control your Host, either Draining their health to Heal yourself or kill them
lotmcraft.avatar_creation_ability.descri: Create an Avatar of yourself, it will be 1 sequence below you
lotmcraft.deceit_ability.description: Deceive surrounding enemies for them to forget about you, or deceive the world to be invulnerable for a short time
lotmcraft.loophole_creation_ability.desc: Create an Area, where enemies will be randomly teleported around and their abilities will be stolen
lotmcraft.fate_siphoning_ability.descrip: Siphon someone's Fate, anything that is going to harm you, will be transferred
ability.lotmcraft.fate_siphoning.resiste: The target's Sequence is too high for Fate Siphoning
lotmcraft.conceptual_theft_ability.descr: Steal Concepts, Steal Day, making it Night, or Steal Night, making it Day. You can also steal an Area and save it in your inventory
lotmcraft.time_manipulation_ability.desc: Manipulate Time in an area in certain ways
lotmcraft.authority_ability.description: Exert the authority of an Arbiter. Strip nearby entities of their buffs, slow them, or strip them of their armor.
lotmcraft.recognition_ability.descriptio: reveals the name, pathway, and sequence of a targeted entity within 40 blocks. Does not reveal lower sequence Justiciars or significantly stronger entities.
lotmcraft.jurisdiction_ability.descripti: establishes a large zone centered on your position. You are alerted when entities enter or leave. Inside your Jurisdiction, your Eye of Ordre range is doubled.
lotmcraft.eye_of_order_ability.descripti: highlight the dangers around you making them glow red
lotmcraft.illusionary_torture_devices_ab: Manifest illusionary torture devices to strike at your foes
ability.lotmcraft.interrogator.branding_: Manifest a Branding Iron in your hand. Each full charge strike deals damage, applies debuffs and drains the target's sanity. Lasts a duration based on your Sequence.
ability.lotmcraft.interrogator.psychic_l: Enchant your held weapon with Sharpness. Higher Sequences receive a weaker enchantment.
ability.lotmcraft.interrogator.psychic_p: Assault the target's mind at range, dealing damage and inflicting Slowness, Weakness, and Nausea while draining their sanity.
ability.lotmcraft.interrogator.whip_of_p: Lash the target with a psychic whip at close range, dealing damage, applying Weakness, and draining their sanity.
lotmcraft.prohibition_ability.descriptio: Declare a type of activity Prohibited within a 80-block zone. Up to 3 zones per type may be active simultaneously.
lotmcraft.prohibition.outside_world_abil: [Outside World] Abilities from outside are Prohibited here
lotmcraft.prohibition.exile_participatin: [Exile of Balance] You cannot participate in this battle.
lotmcraft.prohibition.individual_balance: [Individual Balance] Your Sequence 1 abilities are sealed.
lotmcraft.imprison_ability.description: Imprison a target, freezing them in place. Drains 300 Esprituality from you every 4 seconds. Re-cast to release.
lotmcraft.confinement_ability.descriptio: Erect invisible barrier walls forming a hollow cage around a target location. Teleportation out of the cage is blocked.
lotmcraft.justice_language_ability.descr: Speak verdicts in the Language of Justice. Enforce secrecy, declare death, or prepare a flogging.
ability.lotmcraft.justice_language.flog_: Flog is prepared, your next attack will deal bleeding
lotmcraft.verdict_exile_ability.descript: Exile a target upward with a burst of force, granting them slow falling while they are cast away.
ability.lotmcraft.verdict_exile.no_targe: Aucune cible trouvée for Verdict: Exile.
lotmcraft.punishment_ability.description: Mark a target for Punishment. While active, you emanate a dawn like glow. Triggering a Punishment condition grants you a random buff and inflicts a random debuff on the target.
lotmcraft.law_ability.description: Declare a Loi. The broader the Loi, the shorter its duration.
ability.lotmcraft.law.weaken_declared: [Loi] Weaken Mysticism, Enhance Reality is declared.
ability.lotmcraft.law.enhance_declared: [Loi] Weaken Reality, Enhance Mysticism is declared.
ability.lotmcraft.law.solace_declared: All the dead will receive their eternal peace.
ability.lotmcraft.law.sealing_no_ability: [Loi of Scellement] No recent ability found to seal.
lotmcraft.execution_ability.description: Execute a target from afar. Has a high chance of failing.
lotmcraft.balancing_ability.description: Declare Balance over the lands. All positive and negative effects including your own are stripped every 3 minutes.
lotmcraft.sword_of_judgment_ability.desc: Issue a direct Jugement that cannot be avoided. Success rate starts at 40% and increases by 10% for each time the target has resisted your Prohibitions.
ability.lotmcraft.sword_of_judgment.deli: [Sword of Jugement] has been delivered upon
lotmcraft.delivering_judgment_ability.de: Teleport instantly to the target who has resisted your Lois the most.
ability.lotmcraft.delivering_judgment.no: No target has resisted your Lois.
lotmcraft.exile_of_balance_ability.descr: Assess the balance of nearby forces. Beyonders on the dominant side are exiled from the battle for 10 seconds to 2 minutes, unable to deal damage or use abilities.
ability.lotmcraft.exile_of_balance.remov: [Exile of Balance] You have been removed from this battle for
lotmcraft.individual_balance_ability.des: In a one-on-one confrontation, seal the target's Sequence 1 abilities for 1 minute, bringing both combatants to equal footing.
ability.lotmcraft.individual_balance.sea: [Individual Balance] Your higher-rank abilities have been sealed for 1 minute.
lotmcraft.order_proxy_ability.descriptio: The Hand of Ordre's combined authority. Sacrifice yourself for a brief transcendence, declare permanent prohibitions, or impose permanent laws.
ability.lotmcraft.order_proxy.sacrifice_: has reached the level of a Half Great Old One!
[Ordre Sacrifice] 15 seconds of absolute power. The price will be paid.
ability.lotmcraft.order_proxy.prohibitio: [Ordre Prohibition] Cannot go above limit (3 permanent prohibitions).
ability.lotmcraft.order_proxy.law_limit: [Ordre Loi] Cannot go above limit (2 permanent laws).
lotmcraft.ancient_court_of_judgment_abil: Manifest the Ancient Court of Jugement. Every 10 seconds a random prohibition is declared within the court, binding all who stand inside.
lotmcraft.ancient_court.prohibited: [Ancient Court of Jugement] %s is Prohibited here.
lotmcraft.order_law.combat: [Ordre Loi] Combat is against the Loi here.
lotmcraft.order_law.losing_control: [Ordre Loi] Losing Control is against the Loi here.
lotmcraft.world_judgment_ability.descrip: Make the world judge a player. every time they break a law or prohibition they build judgment stacks that slowly brings them negative effects eventually to their death
ability.lotmcraft.world_judgment.target_: [World Jugement] You have been released from World Jugement.
[World Jugement] You have been placed under World Jugement. Obey the Lois.
lotmcraft.world_judgment.tier_2: [World Jugement] Tier 2 — Heavy damage and Slowing.
lotmcraft.world_judgment.tier_3: [World Jugement] Tier 3 — Heavy damage, Slowing, and all buffs stripped.
lotmcraft.world_judgment.tier_4: [World Jugement] Tier 4 — Heavy damage and Paralysis.
lotmcraft.world_judgment.tier_5: [World Jugement] Tier 5 — Mort by World Jugement.
item.lotmcraft.ability_not_implemented: Abilities for this Sequence are not yet implemented
item.lotmcraft.order_justiciar_ability.d: Subconsciously maintain Ordre. Sense when murder is committed within 40 blocks.
item.lotmcraft.enhanced_mental_attribute: Negative effects, Losing Control, and Divination are less effective against you.
item.lotmcraft.chaos_hunting_justiciar_a: Beyonders who outrank you and those of disaster pathways are revealed with a glow outline visible only to you, within 60 blocks.
item.lotmcraft.word_immunity_abyss_abili: Grants immunity to Nausea and Blindness effects.
item.lotmcraft.passive_theft_ability.des: You have a chance to steal items from mobs or players you hit
ability.lotmcraft.passive_luck.trip: Your enemy tripped and took damage
ability.lotmcraft.passive_luck.effect_re: You were cleansed of negative effects through Luck
item.lotmcraft.passive_luck_ability.desc: Gain Passive Luck that grows with your Sequence
item.lotmcraft.danger_premonition_abilit: Il y a une chance que vous puissiez prévoir les attaques et les esquiver
item.lotmcraft.acrobatics_ability.descri: While Sneaking, you can jump twice as high
item.lotmcraft.paper_dagger_ability.desc: Right click with paper to throw it as a dagger
item.lotmcraft.puppeteering_enhancements: Your range has increased massively and the time it takes was reduced greatly. Your marionettes can now use your abilities. The number of marionettes was increased
item.lotmcraft.miracle_of_resurrection_a: Resurrect from death and hide inside of the historical void.
Revive from the darkness at the cost of losing yourself slowly
item.lotmcraft.blood_loss_ability.descri: Targets you hit have a chance to loose their blood when attacked. You can use the blood for curses or rituals.
item.lotmcraft.mirror_revival_ability.de: If there is glass near you, you will resurrect after death
item.lotmcraft.lightning_arrow_ability.d: Your arrows are infused with lightning, greatly enhancing their strength
item.lotmcraft.riptide_ability.descripti: Your Beyonder Abilities get stronger while you are in water
lotmcraft.disorder_ability.description: Reality is changed for your benefit.
Undead mobs no longer perceive you as a target
item.lotmcraft.solar_sensitivity_ability: During daytime you suffer Weakness. Soleil pathway attacks deal 50% more damage to you
item.lotmcraft.reincarnation_ability.des: When you would die, death is cancelled.
item.lotmcraft.virtual_avatar_ability.de: Virtual Persona: Other can now split off a Identity Avatar into reality
item.lotmcraft.meta_awareness_ability.de: Whoever says your username or divines you will automatically pray to you
item.lotmcraft.pure_idealism_ability.des: The better your mental state - the stronger you are

lotm.negative_effect.slower_in_cold_plac: Plus lent dans les endroits froids

lotm.quest.impl.kill_zombies.description: Kill %s Zombies to complete this quest
lotm.quest.impl.kill_zombies.lore: Zombies are plaguing the area. We need to thin their numbers.
lotm.quest.impl.defend_village.descripti: Kill all the monsters that are attacking the villagers
lotm.quest.impl.defend_village.lore: The village is under attack! Defend the villagers and drive off the monsters!
lotm.quest.impl.kill_tyrant_seq4.descrip: Search around for the structure to summon the Cataclysmic Interrer and defeat them
lotm.quest.impl.kill_tyrant_seq4.lore: The Cataclysmic Interrer is terrorizing all who live here, defeat them and bring peace to the land!
lotm.quest.impl.kill_seq4.description: Search around for the structure to summon the Demigod and defeat them
lotm.quest.impl.kill_seq4.lore: A Demigod has gone mad and is killing all who live here, defeat them before its too late!
lotm.quest.impl.kill_seq3.description: Search around for the structure to summon the Saint and defeat them
lotm.quest.impl.kill_seq3.lore: A Saint has strayed from the church and is bringing chaos, defeat them before its too late!
lotm.quest.impl.kill_seq2.description: Search around for the structure to summon the Angel and defeat them
lotm.quest.impl.kill_seq2.lore: An Angel has fallen and is killing all who live here, defeat them before its too late!
lotm.quest.impl.kill_seq1.description: Search around for the structure to summon the Archangel and defeat them
lotm.quest.impl.kill_seq1.lore: An Archangel is on a rampage, defeat them before its too late!
lotm.quest.impl.collect_low_seq_characte: Power attracts power. Gather characteristics and hand them over for advancement materials.
lotm.quest.impl.find_random_structures.d: Find Ancient Structure and show it to world.
lotm.quest.impl.find_random_structures.l: Forgotten places contain forgotten truths. Find them and return.
lotm.quest.impl.kill_player_target.lore: A name has been chosen. Blood must be drawn.
lotm.quest.impl.help_beyonder: Help this Beyonder overcome his enemies
lotm.quest.impl.help_beyonder.descriptio: Face a wave of enemies and defeat them all.
lotm.quest.impl.help_beyonder.lore: This beyonder have angered forces that are beyond his power.
lotm.quest.impl.deliver_item.description: Deliver an item to the marked location.

lotmcraft.honorific_praying_send_message: Will send the next message you type in chat to the prayer
lotmcraft.honorific_praying_teleport_des: Will teleport your original body to the prayer
